waivers.reason: OF-DID-2026-04-26-02 security remediation ignores NAV accounting while principal returns are in flight, enforces a post-resolution attestation grace barrier, T-R4-blocklist-impl adds address-only block checks, T-SC-loss-settlement adds nonce-bound atomic settleLoss(uint256) for attested loss settlement, T-FINAL-AUDIT disables renounceOwnership, Cantina remediation exposes manual NAV normalization plus tier-share settlement-pending views, and T-CCIP-only-migration replaces the legacy cross-chain receive surface with Chainlink CCIP router/source/sender validation plus a one-time reinitializer for pre-CCIP proxy config migration. T-FIX-final-run-regressions scales Hyperliquid yield settlement by ProtocolTreasury.foundationAllocationBps() before tier/funding allocation so real ProtocolTreasury Foundation top-line routing remains valid. Octane pending-deploy remediation records non-loss in-transit custodian NAV when deploying to Hyperliquid so pre-credit NAV ambiguity cannot trigger vault loss-pending state, and the Phase 2 pattern-audit fix requires full ProtocolTreasury loss absorption before finalizing bridge-managed loss settlement. Cantina follow-up audit loop separates raw attested NAV from display-capped NAV for pending-deploy credit checks, records pending-deploy low NAV as vault-level loss fail-closed, enforces nonce-watermark replay protection for deferred attestations, and refreshes the exact deployed-bytecode allowance for the checked remediation source.

T-FINAL-AUDIT disables renounceOwnership so deployed executor ownership cannot be accidentally or maliciously burned, and T-CCIP-only-migration replaces the legacy cross-chain receive surface with Chainlink CCIP router/source/sender validation plus a one-time reinitializer for pre-CCIP proxy config migration. T-FINAL-run refreshes stale guard metadata to the already checked-in ExecutorProxy source, including HLTradingVault ownership-transfer views and CCIP decode helpers, without changing Hyperliquid source code. CF-5 intentionally adds the ExecutorProxy local freeze workflow, staged freezeGuardian rotation, frozen/shim getters, and freeze/unfreeze/allowlist controls. T-AUDIT-run-loop refreshes the exact current ExecutorProxy deployed-bytecode allowance after full Foundry regression reported the waiver 14 bytes below the checked-in source artifact. Cantina/V12 remediation exposes governance command nonce and epoch views for replay-resistant CCIP governance command processing; the security-audit convergence pass enforces gap-free ordered governance command nonces so out-of-order CCIP delivery cannot skip an earlier command, and records authenticated in-order vault-call failures with GovernanceCommandFailed while consuming the nonce so a failing earlier command cannot deadlock a later emergency command.

T-R4-I4 backing/share monotonicity guard, T-R4-exitcaps-impl stranded-token rescue staging, CF-1 removal of the legacy direct-rescue threshold selector, T-R4-blocklist-impl address-only block checks, and T-SC-loss-settlement/T-SC-rate-limits add nonce-bound NAV-attested loss finalization, two-step manual attestation reporter rotation, and daily mint cap enforcement. Cantina follow-up audit loop enforces strictly increasing nonzero loss nonces so same-nonce manual or bridge reports cannot overwrite existing vault loss state, exposes the settled-loss nonce for cross-contract loss-settlement verification, and refreshes the exact bytecode allowance for the checked source.

T-R4-I4 backing/share monotonicity guard, T-R4-exitcaps-impl weekly withdrawal cap, T-R4-blocklist-impl address-only block checks, CTO follow-up zero-bps rejection, T-FINAL-AUDIT weekly-cap refund accounting, V12/Cantina direct-exit loss-freeze remediation, CF-2 ERC4626 Withdraw event emission for redeemForUpgrade/redeemForReversion, CF-Hybrid-1 named pending-withdrawal getters, and CF-3 per-tier ERC20 metadata reinitializer add mandatory exit-rate, cap administration, blocked-account enforcement, incident-response footgun prevention, non-griefable cancellation behavior, direct withdraw/redeem freeze gating, indexer-visible tier-transition redemption events, position-independent pending-withdrawal client views, and upgrade-safe wallet-visible tier abbreviations. Octane exit-cap remediation keeps requested withdrawals counted against the weekly cap after execution while only refunding any unspent reserved amount. Cantina/V12 PnL routing remediation exposes expired auto-renew-disabled lockup state so protocol yield skips non-claim-bearing expired opt-out positions; the security-audit convergence pass adds expiry-count min-heap tracking so the earliest expired opt-out position is recomputed when the previous earliest holder exits or changes expiry, keeps a holder tracked after post-expiry auto-renew re-enable until actual renewal or exit so re-enable cannot restore PnL eligibility without renewing the lock, blocks expired tracked holders from transferring shares to a fresh account to clear the exclusion before renewal or exit, and counts pending cooldown shares as still exclusion-bearing until cancellation or actual withdrawal execution.

T-R4-I4 combined backing/share guard, audit-remediation combined tier-asset conservation for yielded reversion, T-R4-blocklist-impl address-only block checks, CTO follow-up blocked queue-entry skip/recovery handling, and T-SC-rate-limits removal of automatic tier-cap widening preserve explicit cap governance and queue-liveness behavior. Octane remediation exposes the fixed FORAGE price bound and computes queued deposit minimum shares from previewDeposit to avoid false failures after legitimate loss-induced exchange-rate changes.

T-R4-exitcaps-impl, T-R4-blocklist-impl, CTO follow-up zero-bps rejection, T-SC-rate-limits daily reportLoss cap, and paused-withdrawal blocking add mandatory rolling reportLoss rate-cap enforcement, prepared-loss override checks, cap administration views, blocked-account enforcement, and incident-response footgun prevention. T-IMPL-protocol-treasury-routing intentionally removes direct DevCo/OpCo annual-budget and legacy governance-retained public selectors, then adds top-line Foundation routing and protocol-retained views/withdrawals, including the renamed protocol-retained withdrawal throttle bucket selector. Cantina/V12 remediation adds quotePnLAllocation for caller-side exact split construction, skips non-claim-bearing cooldown/expired opt-out tiers, supports protocol-retained loss cover, and refreshes the exact bytecode allowance for the checked source.

T-R4-exitcaps-impl, T-R4-blocklist-impl, T-SC-rate-limits, and T-FINAL-AUDIT cumulative owner direct-withdrawal budgeting add mandatory owner large-withdrawal staging, blocked-account enforcement, effective default distribution caps, paused emergency-withdrawal blocking, and non-bypassable direct-withdrawal accounting. Cantina/V12 shared-outflow remediation applies the max-single distribution cap to batch totals and refreshes the exact bytecode allowance for the checked source.

T-R4-blocklist-impl adds address-only block checks, T-SC-rate-limits adds per-round airdrop caps tied to the quarterly outflow window for reward value movement, and V12/Cantina shared-outflow remediation separates beneficiary claim checks from admin sweep/withdraw period accounting.

T-R4-blocklist-impl adds address-only block checks for depositor claim, sweep, and withdrawal value movement, and V12/Cantina shared-outflow remediation separates beneficiary claim checks from admin sweep/withdraw period accounting.
T-R4-blocklist-impl adds address-only block checks for partnership distributions, batch recipients, and withdrawals.
T-SC-loss-settlement replaces the one-hour loss-resolution cooldown with a block-based same-block guard, preserving exact current selector and bytecode drift for the final audit baseline.

T-R4-exitcaps-impl extends emergency routing for shrink-only exit-rate and loss-rate cap controls, T-FINAL-AUDIT blocks cancel-guardian cancellation of governor guardian-module replacement proposals, V12/Cantina anti-entrenchment remediation extends cancellation guards to downstream guardian-module rotations plus relay/timelock scheduling paths, security-audit remediation replaces external self-call decoders with internal bounded ABI readers plus whitelisted-downstream validation so unrelated relay/schedule and self-reporting lookalike proposals remain cancellable without adding public selectors, and Cantina/V12 guardian-spam remediation allows guardian-proposed proposal cancellation while preserving protected-mutation cancellation guards.

Existing Octane remediation bytecode drift is preserved explicitly so the simplify guard continues to fail on unreviewed future growth. Cantina/V12 remediation rejects zero NAV baselines and adds explicit emergency return accounting while registry-wide pause is active.
